PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-ABOVE_THE_LAW.title: Above The Law
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-ABOVE_THE_LAW.descri: Transform a [gold]Strike[/gold] and a [gold]Defend[/gold] into any single card of your color. If you are offered this card from a card reward, you are forced to take it.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-ALWAYS_WHALE.title: Always Whale
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-BLAHAJ_ENJOYER.title: Blahaj Enjoyer
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-BLAHAJ_ENJOYER.descr: The Merchant now [gold]transforms[/gold] cards instead of removing them.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-CURSE_OF_GREED_MODIF: Every card you find is [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. Cards have a [blue]50%[/blue] chance to be [gold]exhausted[/gold] for the turn instead of played. Cannot trigger more than once per turn.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-DIG.title: DIG!
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-FIFTY_FIFTY.descript: Start combat with half of your deck in your [gold]Exhaust[/gold] pile.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-FOUR_FOR_FOUR_MODIFI: Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] less card each turn.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-GADGETS_MODIFIER.des: Start with a powerful relic. You can change what it does by removing cards...no wait...must, you must change what it does by removing cards.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-HEIRLOOM.title: Heirloom
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-INCEPTION.title: Inception
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-MY_TRUE_FORM.title: My True Form
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-MY_TRUE_FORM.descrip: Start with [gold]Demon Form[/gold], [gold]Serpent Form[/gold], [gold]Void Form[/gold], [gold]Reaper Form[/gold], and [gold]Echo Form[/gold].
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-NEAPOLITAN.title: Neapolitan
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-ONE_OF_EVERYTHING.de: Start with one of every non innate card. [red]Warning, do not combine with Peak Gaming or Hoarder.[/red]
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-PEAK_GAMING.title: Peak Gaming
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-PEAK_GAMING.descript: Duplicate your starting deck. Start with [gold]Bing Bong[/gold].
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-PERFECT_LETHAL.title: Perfect Lethal
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-PERFECT_LETHAL.descr: Overkill damage is reflected back to the attacker.
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-PRAISE_SNECKO.title: Praise Snecko
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-TEXAS_HOLDEM.title: Texas Hold'em
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-THE_I_GOT_A_ROCK_MOD: All potions are rocks, start with [gold]Petrified Toad[/gold].
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-THE_LAW.title: The Law
PIKCUBERUNMODIFIERS-THE_LAW.description: Transform a [gold]Strike[/gold] and a [gold]Defend[/gold] into any single common card of your color. If you are offered this card from a [gold]card reward[/gold], you must take it.
